title: D3.3.4 Guidelines for “best soil and crop management practices” to minimize use of fertilizers and protect environment and applicability rate of the sustainable management in different pilot areas
description: A comprehensive guide presenting agro-ecological and precision farming strategies for reducing fertilizer use and enhancing environmental protection in European pilot areas. It reviews soil and crop management practices, including cover crops, composting, rotations and variable-rate fertilization, and assesses their applicability across diverse Mediterranean and Continental environments.
